Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 7 

CMR_RECEIVED_DT1 

LABEL: Date First Comprehensive Medication Review (CMR) received 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the date of the initial Comprehensive Medication Review (CMR) with written 
summary in CMS standardized format was received 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 9 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: CMS created the MTM file from
